title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 105.060 - Settlement of account with court
text:
105.060.  Settlement of account with court. — Whenever money shall come to the hands of any officer, except only the state treasurer and county treasurer, on account of fines, penalties, forfeitures and judgments in favor of the state or any county, such officer shall state and settle the account thereof before the court under whose authority the money was received, or on whose writs, records or proceedings the same accrued, at the first regular term after the receipt of the money, in the same manner as is required of sheriffs.
(RSMo 1939 § 11224, A. 1949 H.B. 2046) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 9993; 1919 § 12983; 1909 § 11535 
Collector and other county officers to settle with court--penalty for delinquency, 50.390 to 50.440
